---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new scenario, anti-pattern, or improvement to the skill
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
*"I'm always frustrated when..."*

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

For skill changes, this usually means:

- A new entry in the **10 native browser tools** table (with a use case)
- A new **Common scenario** recipe (with a worked example)
- A new row in the **Anti-patterns** table
- A new **Troubleshooting** entry

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Example

If the request is a new scenario, sketch the workflow:

```
User: "<trigger phrase>"
→ openBrowserPage url=...
→ ...
```

## Project-agnostic check

This skill must work for **any** project, not just yours. Confirm:

- [ ] The proposal contains **no** hard-coded project paths (`c:/dev/...`, `/Users/...`, etc.)
- [ ] The proposal contains **no** UI labels specific to one app or in a non-English language
- [ ] Any new tool-behavior claim is backed by the [upstream VS Code docs](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/guides/browser-agent-testing-guide)

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or links about the feature request here.
